Table of Contents

Enum esriRadarPolarization

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Available polarization options for Radarsat-2 imagery.

[Guid("71C23537-D9E9-4AB8-AFD2-C40A82F770DF")]
public enum esriRadarPolarization

Fields

esriRadarPolarizationAll = 0

0: All polarizations.

esriRadarPolarizationHH = 1

1: Single horizontal co-polarization.

esriRadarPolarizationHH_HV = 5

5: Dual polarization (horizontal transmit).

esriRadarPolarizationHH_VV_HV_VH = 7

7: Full quad polarization.

esriRadarPolarizationHV = 3

3: Single cross polarization (horizontal + vertical).

esriRadarPolarizationVH = 4

4: Single cross polarization (vertical + horizontal).

esriRadarPolarizationVV = 2

2: Single vertical co-polarization.

esriRadarPolarizationVV_VH = 6

6: Dual polarization (vertical transmit).

Made with docfx
